name: Broccoli with Sesame Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch broccoli by dropping it into boiling water for 2-3 minutes, then quickly refresh it by running it under cold water.
2. Dress the cooled broccoli with sesame oil and soy sauce (or vinegar) to taste, then sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds. Add the dressing just before serving at room temperature or it will discolor the broccoli.
